name: Terminalia arjuna
summary: Terminalia arjuna bark extract has limited human cardiac-patient evidence and should remain conservative pending stronger replication.
description: Terminalia arjuna bark extract has limited human cardiac-patient evidence and should remain conservative pending stronger replication.
safetyNotes: Mild GI upset reported in small trials; cardiac patients should use clinician guidance.
contraindications: Caution with cardiac medications and anticoagulants.
interactions: Caution with cardiac medications and anticoagulants.

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
